query_normalized: latent spatial memory for video world models computer science
rationale: This paper qualifies as a foundational reference (category d) for the world models domain, explicitly covering "memory-augmented systems that sustain consistent worlds over time" which directly relates to the user's focus on latent spatial memory in video world models. As a survey/guide paper, it provides the canonical background work that would be expected in a literature review section for this research area.
